description: High-signal ranking relationships used as regression tests for model tuning.

assertions.rationale: Costa is higher in the current snapshot and has a recent LHW win; he should not fall behind lower-snapshot veterans on a close score.
Costa's snapshot support and recent Azamat win should beat Guskov's weaker recent-opponent-quality streak.
Rountree has stronger snapshot/title-lineage context; Jacoby's recent streak should not push him above Rountree.
Rountree should not fall behind Azamat on a recent-form tweak alone because the LHW 5-9 cluster is already a high-risk close-score band.
Rountree's title-lineage and snapshot support should keep him near the top-five edge unless new fight data changes the division.
Jacoby should not be top five unless future data adds stronger elite or snapshot support.
Hill should not disappear below low-context LHW entries while he still has recent elite/title-level division context.
Hill should remain inside the ranked LHW pool unless future results or inactivity make the drop explicit.
Volkan's stronger established contender resume should break close-score ties against Guskov unless Guskov adds a stronger elite win.
Recent title-level context should keep Topuria in the top three.
A recent champion who lost the belt should be treated as the top contender tier, not a normal ranked contender.
Topuria's recent title context should keep him above older former-title context unless direct results change that ordering.
Recent head-to-head and contender context should keep Arman above Charles.
Charles should keep stronger elite/title resume separation over BSD unless BSD adds another elite lightweight win.
Elite resume and recent high-value wins should keep Holloway in the upper top ten.
Holloway's long elite resume and high-value lightweight wins should not be outweighed by a thinner prospect sample.
Holloway's elite resume, current snapshot support, and high-value lightweight wins should win close-score tiebreakers over Gamrot.
Paddy should get credit for dominant wins but should not be boosted into the title tier.
Paddy's dominant ranked-profile wins should keep him above thinner lightweight samples even with schedule-quality penalties.
Islam is the current welterweight champion in the snapshot.
Recent head-to-head should keep Garry above Prates unless future results change the relationship.
Prates has stronger recent opponent-quality context and should not fall behind Morales on undefeated-sample value alone.
Recent champion/title context should keep JDM in the top eight.
JDM's recent champion/title context should keep him in the top-six contender range.
JDM's fresher title context should beat Usman's legacy value unless Usman adds new elite wins.
Strickland is the current middleweight champion in the snapshot.
Khamzat's title-lineage context should keep him near the top contender tier.
Khamzat's title-lineage context should keep him above nearby non-title contenders unless new direct results change the relationship.
Pereira's transferred elite light-heavyweight resume should keep him in the heavyweight top five.
Pereira's dominant transferred LHW resume and heavyweight title-opponent context should keep him in the immediate heavyweight contender tier.
Pereira's cross-division elite title resume should break close heavyweight score ties against Volkov.
